title: cynorkis lilacina subsp. curvicalcar
intro: Cynorkis lilacina subsp. curvicalcar is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, specifically found in the tropical forests of Madagascar. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Cynorkis lilacina subsp. curvicalcar include its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as wounds, burns, and infections, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, this plant is often prepared as a paste or infused in water to create a decoction for topical application or internal consumption.
